title: Transformer Architecture
text: Transformers use self-attention mechanisms to model relationships between tokens in a sequence. They are widely used in language models, retrieval systems, and generative AI applications.

title: Distributed Training
text: Distributed training scales machine learning workloads across multiple GPUs or machines. It introduces communication overhead, synchronization costs, and memory management challenges.

title: Embedding Search
text: Embedding search retrieves semantically similar documents by converting text into dense vectors and comparing them using similarity measures such as cosine similarity.

title: BM25 Ranking
text: BM25 is a lexical ranking function used in information retrieval. It scores documents based on term frequency, inverse document frequency, and document length normalization.

title: Search Evaluation Metrics
text: Search quality can be evaluated using metrics such as Precision at K, Recall at K, Mean Reciprocal Rank, and Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain.

title: Regression Detection
text: Regression detection compares a current benchmark run against a baseline run to identify drops in quality, performance, or reliability.

title: Reproducible ML Experiments
text: Reproducible machine learning experiments require fixed datasets, tracked configurations, saved metrics, and consistent evaluation pipelines.

title: FastAPI Backend Systems
text: FastAPI is a Python framework for building backend APIs. It is commonly used for serving machine learning systems, benchmark services, and developer tools.

title: Hybrid Search
text: Hybrid search combines lexical search signals with vector-based semantic similarity. It can improve retrieval quality by balancing exact keyword matching and semantic understanding.

title: Latency in Search Systems
text: Search systems must balance retrieval quality with latency. Important latency measurements include average latency, p50 latency, and p95 latency.

title: ML Systems Observability
text: Observability in machine learning systems helps engineers monitor metrics, detect failures, understand bottlenecks, and debug production behavior.

title: Vector Indexing
text: Vector indexing organizes dense embeddings for efficient nearest neighbor search. It is used in semantic search, recommendation systems, and retrieval augmented generation.
